items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 21:1
items.html: Partzuf Keter. The vessel where the light of Yechida is clothed is also called Galgalta. (Part 3, Inner Observation, Chapter 8, item 2)
